## Description

What does this PR do and why?

## Related Issues

Closes #

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` тАФ new feature
- [ ] `fix` тАФ bug fix
- [ ] `docs` тАФ documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` тАФ no behavior change
- [ ] `build` / `ci` тАФ build system or CI changes
- [ ] `tests` тАФ adding or updating tests

## Testing

How was this tested? Which boards / targets were used?

- [ ] `west twister -T tests -v --inline-logs` passes
- [ ] Tested on hardware: <!-- board name -->
- [ ] Docs build without warnings: `cd doc && make html`

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow the [Conventional Commits + gitmoji](../CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-messages) style
- [ ] New or changed public APIs have Doxygen comments
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included
